untranslatable_reason: The signal requires identification of a specific bearish chart pattern (not named in the excerpt). The exact pattern formation criteria and visual identification rules are not provided in the source text, and no technical indicators are specified that would allow systematic pattern detection. Only the down breakout direction is concrete; without pattern definition, entry condition cannot be fully mechanized.
translation_notes: Entry condition set as a down breakout (close < prev_close) as a proxy for the unnamed pattern's downward breakout. Exit condition uses a reversal (close > prev_close) as the author provides no explicit exit guidance (AUTHOR_SILENT). Stop loss set conservatively at 5% given the 16-26% average decline metrics. Target regimes set to both BULL_MARKET and BEAR_MARKET per signal specification. Pattern name and most performance metrics marked AUTHOR_SILENT and thus cannot be encoded.
